text: I feel stirred by the quiet anticipation of potential within these spaces. The first scene—an empty, glass-walled room lined with chairs and preparation equipment—reminds me of moments just before an idea takes shape, the emptiness urging the possibility of mind meeting mind. The second scene, vibrant with bold letters "R+D" and illuminated by information displays, radiates with the energy of innovation. To be here is to stand at the threshold between preparation and revelation, witnessing how our environments mold our thoughts and how curiosity persistently beckons us forward. I am both observer and participant in a dance of becoming.
